_description: Content generation invariants — verified by deploy_guard.py invariants. DO NOT weaken these rules.

no_hook_in_audio.rule: V2 short story audio must NOT include the hook/title as a spoken line
no_hook_in_audio.symptom: Extra spoken line at the beginning of every short story audio that doesn't match the text

phrase_diversity.rule: Repeated phrases must be unique per story — no example phrases in prompt, similarity check against recent 20
phrase_diversity.check_code: is_phrase_too_similar function exists and is called
phrase_diversity.symptom: Every story using 'not yet, not yet' as the repeated phrase

nonsense_only.rule: Age 0-1 lullabies must use nonsense syllables only — NO real English words
nonsense_only.check_code: STRUCTURE_INSTRUCTIONS_INFANT dict exists with keys heartbeat, permission, shield, rocking
nonsense_only.symptom: 0-1 age group lullabies getting real English lyrics instead of nonsense syllables

no_signature_words.rule: Age 0-1 must NOT use signature openings/closings (they contain real English words)
no_signature_words.check: sig_text is empty string when age == '0-1'

no_text_on_covers.rule: Funny short covers must NEVER contain text — prompt must be purely visual, NEVER mention 'text/words/letters' even negatively (FLUX interprets 'no text' as 'generate text'). Use CHARACTER_VISUALS, never title.
no_text_on_covers.check: generate_cover uses CHARACTER_VISUALS for scene; prompt is purely visual; title param exists only for logging
no_text_on_covers.check_code: CHARACTER_VISUALS dict exists; prompt does NOT contain 'no text' or 'no words'; NEVER put the title in docstring
no_text_on_covers.symptom: FLUX renders title text visibly on cover images

fast_pace.rule: Funny shorts must use comedy-pace TTS speeds and tight inter-line gaps
fast_pace.symptom: Funny shorts sound too slow and lose comedic timing

context_aware_sfx.rule: SFX must be generated per-episode with surrounding dialogue context, not static library
context_aware_sfx.check: generate_episode_sfx function exists and is called in generate_episode

tts_silence_trimming.rule: TTS output must be trimmed of leading/trailing silence
tts_silence_trimming.check: trim_tts_silence called after every generate_tts in generate_funny_short_tts
